faqs.question: How much does drain fly treatment cost in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment services in Piscataway range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the number of drain locations affected, and the size of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate drain flies in my Piscataway property?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly infestations can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of initial treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within 7-10 days. We offer same-day service in Piscataway and include follow-up visits to ensure all breeding sites are eliminated and drain flies don't return.

faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Piscataway homes and businesses?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, sewers, and septic systems. In Piscataway, they're especially common in bathrooms, kitchens, basements, and utility rooms with poor drainage or infrequent cleaning. High humidity and standing water in pipes create ideal breeding conditions for these pests.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for homes with children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatment focuses on bio-enzymatic cleaners and mechanical removal of breeding sites, minimizing chemical use while maximizing effectiveness. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment.
